sqlMap.select: SELECT tbContainer.ContainerID, tbContainer.ContainerTypeID, tbContainer.ContainerOwnDepID, tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName, tbContainerType.ContainerTypeName2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINERTYPE ON TBCONTAINER.ContainerTypeID = TBCONTAINERTYPE.ContainerTypeID AND TBCONTAINER.TENANT_ID = TBCONTAINERTYPE.TENANT_ID WHERE CONTAINEROWNDEPID = #v_DEPTID# AND TBCONTAINER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.ContainerTypeID, TBCODELIST.CODE2 DocumentState, TBCONTAINERTYPE.ContainerTypeName, TBCONTAINERTYPE.ContainerTypeName2, TBCODELIST.NAME DOCUMENTSTATENAME, TBCODELIST.NAME2 DOCUMENTSTATENAME2, TBCODELIST.NAME3 DOCUMENTSTATENAME3, TBCODELIST.NAME4 DOCUMENTSTATENAME4 FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCODELIST LEFT JOIN EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE ON TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.DocumentState = TBCODELIST.CODE2 AND TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID = TBCODELIST.TENANT_ID LEFT JOIN EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINERTYPE ON TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.ContainerTypeID = TBCONTAINERTYPE.ContainerTypeID AND TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.TENANT_ID = TBCONTAINERTYPE.TENANT_ID WHERE (TBCODELIST.CODE1 = 'A02' AND TBCODELIST.ISUSE = '1') AND TBCODELIST.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY TBCONTAINERTODOCSTATE.DocumentState

SELECT CONTAINERID, USEDEPID, (SELECT DISPLAYNAME FROM TBLDEPTMASTER@DBLK_EZHRMASTER WHERE CN = A.USEDEPID) as containerTypeName, (SELECT DISPLAYNAME2 FROM TBLDEPTMASTER@DBLK_EZHRMASTER WHERE CN = A.USEDEPID) as containerTypeName2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINERUSEDEP A WHERE CONTAINERID = #v_CONTID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT TASKCODE, KEEPINGPERIOD, TEMPFLAG, DISPLAYRECFLAG, SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, SC1, SC2, SC3, KEEPINGMETHOD, KEEPINGPLACE, TASKNAME, TASKNAME2, SUBCATEGORYCODE FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODE WHERE SUBCATEGORYCODE = #v_SUBCATECODE# AND DELFLAG = '0' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY TASKCODE

SELECT TBTASKCODE.TASKCODE, TBTASKCODE.TASKNAME, NVL(TBTASKCODE.TASKNAME2, TBTASKCODE.TASKNAME) AS TASKNAME2, TBTASKCODE.KEEPINGPERIOD, TBTASKCODE.CREATIONDATE CREATEDATE, TBTASKCODE.KPREASON, TBTASKCODE.KEEPINGMETHOD, TBTASKCODE.KEEPINGPLACE, TBTASKCODE.DISPLAYRECFLAG, TBTASKCODE.DISPLAYRECTRASTIME, TBTASKCODE.EXDISPLAYFREQUENCY, TBTASKCODE.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, TBTASKCODE.SC1, TBTASKCODE.SC2, TBTASKCODE.SC3, TBTASKCODE.DISPLAYUSAGE, TBTASKCODE.DESCRIPTION, TBTASKCODE.TEMPFLAG, TBTASK_DEPTINFO.PROCESSDATE, TBTASK_DEPTINFO.APPLYDATE FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASK_DEPTINFO ON TBTASKCODE.TASKCODE = TBTASK_DEPTINFO.TASKCODE AND TBTASKCODE.TENANT_ID = TBTASK_DEPTINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE TBTASKCODE.TASKCODE = #v_TASKCODE# AND TBTASKCODE.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND TBTASK_DEPTINFO.PROCESSDEPTCODE = #v_DEPTCODE#

SELECT TASKCODE, TASKNAME, TASKNAME2, KEEPINGPERIOD, KPREASON, KEEPINGMETHOD, KEEPINGPLACE, DISPLAYRECFLAG, DISPLAYRECTRASTIME, EXDISPLAYFREQUENCY, SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, SC1, SC2, SC3, DISPLAYUSAGE, DESCRIPTION, SUBCATEGORYCODE FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODE WHERE TASKCODE = #v_TASKCODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT TASKNAME, TASKNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODE WHERE TASKCODE = #v_TASKCODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT PROCESSDEPTCODE, PROCESSDEPTNAME, NVL(PROCESSDEPTNAME2, PROCESSDEPTNAME) AS PROCESSDEPTNAME2, CATEGORYCODE, CNAME, NVL(CNAME2,CNAME) AS CNAME2, MCATEGORYCODE, MCNAME, NVL(MCNAME2, MCNAME) AS MCNAME2, SUBCATEGORYCODE, SCNAME, NVL(SCNAME2, SCNAME) AS SCNAME2, TASKCODE, TASKNAME, NVL(TASKNAME2, TASKNAME) AS TASKNAME2, KEEPINGPERIOD, KEEPINGMETHOD, KEEPINGPLACE, DISPLAYRECFLAG, DISPLAYRECTRASTIME, SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, SC1, SC2, SC3, TEMPFLAG FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.VTASKCLASS WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND ( PROCESSDEPTCODE = #v_DEPTCODE# OR TASKCODE LIKE 'ZZ%' OR TASKCODE = '99999999')
ORDER BY TASKCODE ASC

SELECT PROCESSDEPTCODE, PROCESSDEPTNAME, PROCESSDEPTNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASK_DEPTINFO WHERE TASKCODE = v_TASKCODE AND DELFLAG = '0' AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY PROCESSDEPTCODE

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT SEALNUM, SEALNAME, SEALPATH, SEALWIDTH, SEALHEIGHT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(DELDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, REGUSERID, REGUSERNAME FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY REGDATE DESC
isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT SEALNUM, SEALNAME, SEALPATH, SEALWIDTH, SEALHEIGHT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(DELDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, REGUSERID, REGUSERNAME FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALINFO WHERE DELDATE IS NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY REGDATE DESC

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT SEALNUM, SEALNAME, SEALPATH, SEALWIDTH, SEALHEIGHT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(DELDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, REGUSERID, NVL(REGUSERNAME2, REGUSERNAME) REGUSERNAME FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALINFO ORDER BY REGDATE DESC
isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT SEALNUM, SEALNAME, SEALPATH, SEALWIDTH, SEALHEIGHT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(DELDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, REGUSERID, NVL(REGUSERNAME2, REGUSERNAME) REGUSERNAME FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALINFO WHERE DELDATE IS NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY REGDATE DESC

select.isEqual: SELECT SEALNUM, SEALNAME, SEALPATH, SEALWIDTH, SEALHEIGHT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(DELDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, REGUSERID, REGUSERNAME, REGUSERNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALDEPTINFO WHERE DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY REGDATE DESC
select.isNotEqual: SELECT SEALNUM, SEALNAME, SEALPATH, SEALWIDTH, SEALHEIGHT, TO_CHAR(REGDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') REGDATE, TO_CHAR(DELDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') DELDATE, REGUSERID, REGUSERNAME, REGUSERNAME2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALDEPTINFO WHERE DELDATE IS NULL AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY REGDATE DESC

sqlMap.select:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.* FROM (
SELECT * FROM (SELECT rownum as rnum, aa.* FROM (SELECT TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID, FORMID, ORGDOCID, DOCTYPE, DOCSTATE, FUNCTIONTYPE, HREF, DOCTITLE, DOCNO, HASATTACHYN, HASOPINIONYN, TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS STARTDATE, TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS ENDDATE, WRITERID, WRITERNAME, NVL(WRITERNAME2, WRITERNAME) AS WRITERNAME2, WRITERJOBTITLE, NVL(WRITERJOBTITLE2, WRITERJOBTITLE) AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, WRITERDEPTID, WRITERDEPTNAME, NVL(WRITERDEPTNAME2,WRITERDEPTNAME) AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, ISPUBLIC, SECURITYCODE, STORAGEPERIOD, KEYWORD, FORMNAME, NVL(FORMNAME2,FORMNAME) AS FORMNAME2, TBAPRDOCINFO.COMPANYID, ITEMCODE, ITEMNAME, NVL(ITEMNAME2, ITEMNAME) AS ITEMNAME2, URGENTAPPROVAL, TEMPATTRIBUTE, STATUS, SPECIALRECORDCODE, PUBLICITYCODE, LIMITRANGE, PAGENUM, CABINETID, TASKCODE, DOCNUMCODE, ORGDOCNUMCODE, SEPERATEATTACHXML, SUMMARY, TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBAPRDOCINFO RIGHT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT DOCID, TENANT_ID FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME = #v_APPROVUSER#
) aaa ON EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = aaa.DOCID AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = aaa.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE (FUNCTIONTYPE IS NOT NULL) AND (STARTDATE IS NOT NULL)
AND DOCNO LIKE '%' || #v_DOCNUMBER# || '%'
AND DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%'
AND WRITERNAME$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER# || '%'
AND WRITERDEPTNAME$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME# || '%'
AND FORMID = #v_FORMID#
AND DOCSTATE = #v_DOCSTATE#
AND TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #v_STARTDATE1#
AND TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #v_STARTDATE2#
AND TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #v_ENDDATE1#
AND TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #v_ENDDATE2#
AND #v_SUBQUERY#
ORDER BY #v_ORDEROPTION#
ORDER BY #v_ORDEROPTION#, STARTDATE DESC
ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC
) aa ) WHERE rnum <= #v_PAGESIZE#) A
ORDER BY #v_ORDEROPTION2#
ORDER BY #v_ORDEROPTION2#, STARTDATE
ORDER BY STARTDATE
) WHERE rownum <= #v_PAGESIZE2# ORDER BY STARTDATE DESC
SELECT * FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBFORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE FORMCONTID = #v_FORMCONTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.procedure: SELECT FormContID, FormID, FormName, FormName2, FormDocType, Formdescription, FormFilelocation, FormConnFlag FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBFORMINFO WHERE FormID = #v_PFORMID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

isEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT APPLYDATE, TASKCODE, TASKNAME, CHANGEFACTOR, BEFOREVALUE, AFTERVALUE FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODEHISTORY WHERE TASKCODE = #v_TASKCODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN DESC
isEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT APPLYDATE, TASKCODE, TASKNAME, TASKNAME2, CHANGEFACTOR, BEFOREVALUE, AFTERVALUE FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODEHISTORY WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 100

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT APPLYDATE, TASKCODE, NVL(TASKNAME2, TASKNAME) TASKNAME, NVL(CHANGEFACTOR2, CHANGEFACTOR) CHANGEFACTOR, BEFOREVALUE, AFTERVALUE2 AFTERVALUE FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODEHISTORY WHERE TASKCODE = #v_TASKCODE# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN DESC
isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT * FROM (SELECT APPLYDATE, TASKCODE, NVL(TASKNAME2, TASKNAME) TASKNAME, NVL(CHANGEFACTOR2, CHANGEFACTOR) CHANGEFACTOR, BEFOREVALUE, AFTERVALUE2 AFTERVALUE FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODEHISTORY WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID# ORDER BY SN DESC) WHERE ROWNUM <= 100

isEqual.isEqual: SELECT SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME, NVL(COUNT(SENTDEPTID), 0) APRCOUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TENANT_ID #tenantID# GROUP BY SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME ORDER BY SENTDEPTNAME

SELECT RECEIVEDDEPTID , RECEIVEDDEPTNAME , NVL(COUNT(RECEIVEDDEPTID), 0) APRCOUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY RECEIVEDDEPTID,RECEIVEDDEPTNAME ORDER BY RECEIVEDDEPTNAME

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT SENTDEPTID , SENTDEPTNAME, RECEIVEDDEPTID, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, NVL(COUNT(SENTDEPTID), 0) APRCOUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME, RECEIVEDDEPTID, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME ORDER BY SENTDEPTNAME, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME

isNotEqual.isEqual: SELECT SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME2 SENTDEPTNAME, NVL(COUNT(SENTDEPTID), 0) APRCOUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND RECEIVESN = '2' AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME2 ORDER BY SENTDEPTNAME2

SELECT RECEIVEDDEPTID, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, COUNT(RECEIVEDDEPTID) APRCOUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY RECEIVEDDEPTID, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 ORDER BY RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2

isNotEqual.isNotEqual: SELECT SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME2 SENTDEPTNAME, RECEIVEDDEPTID, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 RECEIVEDDEPTNAME, NVL(COUNT(SENTDEPTID), 0) APRCOUNT FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBENDRECEIPTPROCESSINFO WHERE DOCSTATE = '011' AND PROCESSDATE >= TO_DATE(#v_FROM#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND PROCESSDATE < TO_DATE(#v_TO#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID# GROUP BY SENTDEPTID, SENTDEPTNAME2, RECEIVEDDEPTID, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2 ORDER BY SENTDEPTNAME2, RECEIVEDDEPTNAME2

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(TBCONTAINER.ContainerID), 0) FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINERTYPE ON TBCONTAINER.ContainerTypeID = TBCONTAINERTYPE.ContainerTypeID AND TBCONTAINER.TENANT_ID = TBCONTAINERTYPE.TENANT_ID WHERE TBCONTAINER.ContainerTypeID = #v_CONTTYPEID# AND TBCONTAINER.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINERTYPE WHERE CONTAINERTYPEID = #v_CONTTYPEID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT CONTAINERID FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINER WHERE CONTAINERTYPEID = #v_CONTTYPEID# AND CONTAINEROWNDEPID = (SELECT CONTAINEROWNDEPID FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINER WHERE containerID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

SELECT NVL(COUNT(DISTINCT TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID), 0) FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBAPRDOCINFO RIGHT OUTER JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT DOCID, TENANT_ID FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBAPRLINEINFO WHERE TBAPRLINEINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND TBAPRLINEINFO.APRMEMBERNAME = #v_APPROVUSER#
) aaa ON TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = aaa.DOCID AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = aaa.TENANT_ID INNER JOIN EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBEXPAPRDOCINFO ON TBAPRDOCINFO.DOCID = TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.DOCID AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = TBEXPAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID WHERE (FUNCTIONTYPE IS NOT NULL) AND (STARTDATE IS NOT NULL) AND TBAPRDOCINFO.TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
AND DOCNO LIKE '%' || #v_DOCNUMBER# || '%'
AND DOCTITLE LIKE '%' || #v_DOCTITLE# || '%'
AND WRITERNAME$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%' || #v_DRAFTER# || '%'
AND WRITERDEPTNAME$v_LANGTYPE$ LIKE '%' || #v_DEPTNAME# || '%'
AND FORMID = #v_FORMID#
AND DOCSTATE = #v_DOCSTATE#
AND TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #v_STARTDATE1#
AND TO_CHAR(STARTDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #v_STARTDATE2#
AND TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') >= #v_ENDDATE1#
AND TO_CHAR(ENDDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') <= #v_ENDDATE2#
AND #v_SUBQUERY#

update.isEqual: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALINFO SET DELDATE = TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE DELDATE IS NULL AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALINFO SET DELDATE = TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE SEALNUM = #v_SEALNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

update.isEqual: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALDEPTINFO SET DELDATE = TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE DELDATE IS NULL AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
update.isNotEqual: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALDEPTINFO SET DELDATE = TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') WHERE SEALNUM = #v_SEALNUM# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#

sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(SEALNUM), 0) FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALINFO WHERE SEALNUM = #v_SEALNUM# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALINFO (SEALNUM, SEALNAME, SEALPATH, SEALWIDTH, SEALHEIGHT, REGDATE, DELDATE, REGUSERID, REGUSERNAME, REGUSERNAME2, TENANT_ID) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(SEALNUM), 0) + 1 FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALINFO), #v_SEALNAME#, #v_SEALPATH#, #v_SEALWIDTH#, #v_SEALHEIGHT#, TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), NULL, #v_REGUSERID#, #v_REGUSERNAME#, #v_REGUSERNAME2#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBSEALINFO SET SEALNAME = #v_SEALNAME#, SEALPATH = #v_SEALPATH#, SEALWIDTH = #v_SEALWIDTH#, SEALHEIGHT = #v_SEALHEIGHT#, REGUSERID = #v_REGUSERID#, REGUSERNAME = #v_REGUSERNAME#, REGUSERNAME2 = #v_REGUSERNAME2# WHERE SEALNUM = v_SEALNUM AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(COUNT(SEALNUM), 0) FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALDEPTINFO WHERE SEALNUM = #v_SEALNUM# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALDEPTINFO (SEALNUM, DEPTID, SEALNAME, SEALPATH, SEALWIDTH, SEALHEIGHT, REGDATE, DELDATE, REGUSERID, REGUSERNAME, REGUSERNAME2, TENANT_ID) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX(SEALNUM) , 0) + 1 FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALDEPTINFO WHERE DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#), #v_DEPTID#, #v_SEALNAME#, #v_SEALPATH#, #v_SEALWIDTH#, #v_SEALHEIGHT#, TO_DATE(#v_pNow#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), NULL, #v_REGUSERID#, #v_REGUSERNAME#, #v_REGUSERNAME2#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBSEALDEPTINFO SET SEALNAME = #v_SEALNAME#, SEALPATH = #v_SEALPATH#, SEALWIDTH = #v_SEALWIDTH#, SEALHEIGHT = #v_SEALHEIGHT#, REGUSERID = #v_REGUSERID#, REGUSERNAME = #v_REGUSERNAME#, REGUSERNAME2 = #v_REGUSERNAME2# WHERE SEALNUM = #v_SEALNUM# AND DEPTID = #v_DEPTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBFORMCONTAINER WHERE FORMCONTID = #v_FORMCONTID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBFORMINFO WHERE FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
DELETE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBFORMUSERINFO WHERE FORMID = #v_FORMID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBENDAPRDOCINFO SET CONTAINERID = #v_CONTID# WHERE DOCID = #v_DOCID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.select: SELECT NVL(MAX(FORMCONTID),0) FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBFORMCONTAINER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
SELECT containertypeid, containertypename, containertypename2 FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINERTYPE
SELECT NVL(MAX(containerid), '0000000000') as contid FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINER
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODEHISTORY( applydate, taskcode, taskname, taskname2, changefactor, changefactor2, beforevalue, aftervalue, aftervalue2, TENANT_ID )VALUES( #v_APPLYDATE#, #v_TASKCODE#, #v_TASKNAME#, #v_TASKNAME2#, #v_CHANGEFACTOR#, #v_CHANGEFACTOR2#, #v_BEFOREVALUE#, #v_AFTERVALUE#, #v_AFTERVALUE2#, #tenantID# )

INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODE( taskcode, taskname, taskname2, keepingperiod, creationdate, kpreason, keepingmethod, keepingplace, displayrecflag, displayrectrastime, exdisplayfrequency, specialcatalogflag, sc1, sc2, sc3, displayusage, description, subcategorycode )VALUES( #v_TASKCODE#, #v_TASKNAME#, #v_TASKNAME2#, #v_KEEPINGPERIOD#, #v_CREATIONDATE#, #v_KPREASON#, #v_KEEPINGMETHOD#, #v_KEEPINGPLACE#, #v_DISPLAYRECFLAG#, #v_DISPLAYRECTRASTIME#, #v_EXDISPLAYFREQUENCY#, #v_SPECIALCATALOGFLAG#, #v_SC1#, #v_SC2#, #v_SC3#, #v_DISPLAYUSAGE#, #v_DESCRIPTION#, #v_SUBCATEGORYCODE# )

INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASK_DEPTINFO( createdate, description, processdeptname, processdeptname2, tasktransferflag, tdeptcode, processdeptcode, processdate, applydate, taskcode, delflag, deletedate, organcode ) SELECT creationdate, NULL, #deptName#, #deptName2#, '0', NULL, #deptCode#, TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'yyyyMMDDHH24MI'), TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'yyyyMMDD'), taskcode, '0', NULL, NULL FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODE WHERE taskcode = #taskCode#

INSERT INTO EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBFORMCONTAINER (FormContID, FormContName, FormContName2, FormContOwnDepID, FormContParents, FormContdescription, TENANT_ID) VALUES (#contID#, #contName#, #contName2#, #contDept#, #contParent#, #contDescript#, #tenantID#)
sqlMap.update: UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBCONTAINER SET containertypeid = #contType#, containerowndepid = #deptID# WHERE containerid = #contID#

UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODE SET taskname = #v_TASKNAME#, taskname2 = #v_TASKNAME2#, keepingperiod = #v_KEEPINGPERIOD#, kpreason = #v_KPREASON#, keepingmethod = #v_KEEPINGMETHOD#, keepingplace = #v_KEEPINGPLACE#, displayrecflag = #v_DISPLAYRECFLAG#, displayrectrastime = #v_DISPLAYRECTRASTIME#, exdisplayfrequency = #v_EXDISPLAYFREQUENCY#, specialcatalogflag = #v_SPECIALCATALOGFLAG#, sc1 = #v_SC1#, sc2 = #v_SC2#, sc3 = #v_SC3#, DisplayUsage = #v_DISPLAYUSAGE#, Description = #v_DESCRIPTION#, SubCategoryCode = #v_SUBCATEGORYCODE# WHERE taskcode = #v_TASKCODE#
UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASKCODE SET delflag = '1' WHERE taskcode = #taskCode#
UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASK_DEPTINFO SET delflag = '1', deletedate = #now# WHERE taskcode = #taskCode#

UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASK_DEPTINFO SET processDate = TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'yyyyMMDDHH24MI'), processDeptName = #deptName#, processDeptName2 = #deptName2#, delFlag = '0', deleteDate = NULL WHERE taskCode = #taskCode# AND TRIM(processDeptCode) = #deptCode#

UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBTASK_DEPTINFO SET processDate = TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'yyyyMMDDHH24MI'), delFlag = '1', deleteDate = TO_CHAR(sysdate, 'yyyy-MM-DD') WHERE taskCode = #taskCode# AND TRIM(processDeptCode) = #deptCode#

UPDATE EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBFORMCONTAINER SET FormContName = #contName#, FormContName2 = #contName2#, FormContOwnDepID = #contDept#, FormContParents = #contParent#, FormContDescription = #contDescript# WHERE FormContID = #contID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM EZAPPROVALG_$companyID$.TBFORMCONTUSERGROUP WHERE FormContID = #contID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
